description: Send notifications to your own Octopush destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise octopush:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into an Octopush SMS Campaign API JSON body and post it to api.octopush.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-octopush_sms

request.template: {"urls":"octopush://${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_API_LOGIN }/${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_API_KEY }/${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"octopush://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_login_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"recipients":[{"phone_number":"${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_TO }"}],"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"purpose":"alert","sender":"${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_FROM }"}

{"recipients":[{"phone_number":"${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_TO }"}],"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"purpose":"alert","sender":"${ customer_secrets.OCTOPUSH_SMS_FROM }"}
